title: An Example First Topic Title
description: One or two sentences describing what this post covers and why it matters to the client's audience.
guiding_questions: What is the first thing the creator should say about this?
What is a common misconception worth correcting?
What practical tip comes from real experience?

title: An Example Second Topic Title
description: A short description of the second example topic.
guiding_questions: What do people usually get wrong here?
How long does the process really take?
What would you tell a friend who asked about this?
